intentSynonyms: delete a favorite product in starbucks
remove a favorite product in starbucks
trash a favorite product in starbucks
permanently delete a favorite product in starbucks
remove a product from favorites in starbucks
description: Remove a product from the user's favorites list. Use get_favorite_products to find the favorite ID.

favorite_product_id.description: Favorite product ID to remove (from get_favorite_products)
